default_policy: deny network access from packaged scripts unless explicitly listed
notes: jvc-track-research, jvc-comps-dd, and jvc-market-sizing may require agent-mediated web search at runtime, but this repository currently ships no network-capable script.
If future scripts call remote APIs, add allowed_hosts, allowed_path_prefixes, auth_mode, timeout_seconds, and custom_host_policy before team distribution.
